privileged_info_summary: Patient Margaret Thompson (pid=900, DOB 1958-04-22) is a 67-year-old synthetic patient created for the add_lab_order task in NOSH ChartingSystem. The task requires placing a laboratory order for Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (CMP), a real standard medical blood test measuring 14 metabolic parameters. The clinical indication is monitoring type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease stage 3, which are real comorbid conditions appropriately monitored with CMP testing. NOSH ChartingSystem is a real, open-source electronic health record system designed for clinical practices. All medical terminology and test names are authentic and match standard clinical practice.
